name: shopwired
description: Reads and writes ShopWired v1 catalog, order, customer, content, marketing, shipping, theme, webhook, wishlist, and payment resources through the documented REST API.

risk.read: external ShopWired API reads across catalog, orders, customers, content, marketing, shipping, webhooks, themes, wishlists, stock, and payments resources
risk.write: external ShopWired API mutations that create, update, delete, refund, dispatch, verify, modify, or otherwise alter store data
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive deletes and irreversible store changes are flagged destructive
